ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing item is designed */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the clothing item */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the size belongs to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the clothing item (e.g., 0, 2, 4, etc.) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the clothing item */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement of the clothing item */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the clothing item */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the clothing item */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the clothing item */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the clothing item */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement of the clothing item */,
  "cuff" REAL /* Cuff measurement of the clothing item */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement of the clothing item */,
  "hip_height" REAL /* Hip height measurement of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement profile belongs to */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the customer */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement of the customer */,
  "cuff" REAL /* Cuff measurement of the customer */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement of the customer */,
  "hip_height" REAL /* Hip height measurement of the customer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chosen by the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* City for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* State for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Country for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being tracked */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the clothing item */,
  "supplier_sku" TEXT /* Supplier's stock-keeping unit (SKU) for the item */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
